settings.heading: Nature's Purest Gold, From the Heart of Himachal Valley
settings.subheading: Unprocessed. Unfiltered. Untouched. Our bees roam wild Himalayan meadows to bring you honey in its most authentic form.

settings.title: 100% Pure & Raw
settings.description: No heating, no filtering, no additives

settings.title: Free Shipping
settings.description: On all orders above ₹999 across India

settings.title: Pure Honey, Straight from the Hive
settings.subtitle: Every jar tells the story of Himalayan wildflowers, patient bees, and generations of beekeeping wisdom.

settings.text: Cold-extracted to preserve all natural enzymes
Zero heating, zero filtering, zero compromises
FSSAI certified and lab-tested for purity

settings.heading: Born in the Valleys, Raised by the Mountains

settings.title: Himalayan Origin
settings.description: Sourced from pristine alpine forests of Himachal Pradesh at elevations above 1500 metres, where pollution is zero and biodiversity is unmatched.

settings.title: Wild Bee Colonies
settings.description: Our bees are never fed sugar syrups. They forage freely on 200+ varieties of Himalayan wildflowers, medicinal herbs, and forest flora.

settings.title: Lab Tested & FSSAI Certified
settings.description: Every batch is independently tested for purity, HMF levels, moisture, and adulteration. Certificates available on request.

settings.title: Cold Extracted
settings.description: We never heat our honey. Cold extraction preserves all live enzymes, antioxidants, pollen, and the natural goodness of raw honey.

settings.title: Farmer First
settings.description: We pay Himachali beekeepers 40% above market rate, ensuring sustainable livelihoods and ethical harvesting practices.

settings.title: Fast Pan-India Delivery
settings.description: Dispatched within 24 hours, delivered across all 28 states. Temperature-controlled packaging ensures freshness.

settings.title: Why Our Honey is Different
settings.subtitle: Not all honey is created equal. Here's what sets Himachal Valley apart.

settings.title: Wild Bees Forage
settings.description: Our bees fly up to 3km across pristine Himalayan meadows collecting nectar from over 200 wildflower varieties.

settings.title: Hive Maturation
settings.description: The bees naturally convert nectar to honey. We wait until the comb is fully capped — never rushing the process.

settings.title: Cold Extraction
settings.description: Frames are cold-spun below 37°C preserving every enzyme, antioxidant, and pollen grain.

settings.title: Packed & Delivered
settings.description: Filled into glass jars, sealed, lab-tested, and dispatched to your doorstep within 24 hours.

settings.title: The Journey of Your Honey
settings.subtitle: Every jar of Himachal Valley honey follows a sacred, time-honoured process.

settings.review: I switched from supermarket honey to Himachal Valley 6 months ago and I will never go back. The taste difference is incredible — you can smell the Himalayan flowers in each spoonful.
settings.name: Arjun Mehta

settings.review: Ordered for my diabetic mother. The doctor said raw honey is better and this one is exactly what she needed. Packing is beautiful, delivery was in 2 days.
settings.name: Sunita Patel

settings.review: The Diwali gift hamper was a massive hit. Everyone was asking where I got such premium quality honey. The packaging is truly luxury level.
settings.name: Rohan Nair

settings.review: As a nutritionist, I always recommend raw honey to clients. Himachal Valley is the only brand I trust completely. Lab certified, raw, and the taste is exceptional.
settings.name: Dr. Kavya Reddy
